title: Sparkling Strikes
description: Add fun particles whenever you land a strike on your foe!
body:
# Sparkling Strikes
## Add fun particles whenever you land a strike on your foe!

Sparkling Strikes adds fun particles whenever any entity takes damage. It is also very customizable. As of now, you can choose between 5 particle types, the number of particles to be spawned, and if there should be a secondary particle. The secondary particle will have its own config options.

If you wish to see the particle types, visit the gallery! Or, if you'd like to know even more information related to this mod's config, you can visit the wiki!

**Please note:** This mod requires Fabric API. If you wish to change the config, you will need Mod Menu.

**Another note:** This mod *may* cause some lag depending on both the particle amount(s) being set too high and your device. There is also a handy config option to disable the mod instantly if needed. This is useful if you plan on visiting a mob farm of some sort.
